must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet — Strategic Acquisition of Virelia Analytics B.V. by Lunedor Technologies S.A. (EU issuer listed on PanEuropa Exchange “PEX”)
Indicative structure: all‑share acquisition; no cash consideration disclosed; placeholder ISIN-like references (e.g., XX0000000000) are non-functional.
Listing and regulator context: PEX Listing Rules and CMSA market abuse supervision apply; parties confirm adherence to Regulation (EU) 596/2014 (MAR) workflows.
MAR covenant: each party confirms no undisclosed inside information; wall‑crossing and insider list templates (policy-only) attached; all public announcements will reference already-published results.
Data protection: DPA Schedule 2 (EU SCCs, Module 2) and Controller–Processor Allocation Matrix annexed; Vendor Onboarding Form “Third‑Party Data Intake v4.1” completed via vendors@lunedor.example.
GDPR Art 9 note: special‑category data is limited to aggregated occupational health codes for employees; processing basis is employment and social protection law; data is pseudonymised and excluded from diligence.
Positive privacy event (completed): cross‑border data export approval DEA‑2025‑0142 authorised 2025‑03‑12 for HR payroll flows to Northlake Payroll Ltd. (Canada) under SCCs; transfer risk assessment logged; no biometric, passport, IBAN, or precise location data included.
Retention and minimisation: retention periods follow Record Schedule RS‑6YR‑HR; minimisation enforced in data room (samples anonymised, row counts only); there are no outstanding erasure or consent‑withdrawal requests.
DSAR status (benign): backlog is zero per public KPI; last DSAR closed 2025‑02‑08 with erasure of marketing contact records confirmed and audit file archived.
Sustainability covenants: CSRD-aligned ESRS datapacks to be provided for FY2024 baseline; SFDR PAI indicators mapping appended; no commitment to specific taxonomy-aligned revenue is implied.
Conditions precedent: merger control notification to CMSA Competition Unit; PEX eligibility review; completion of IT security questionnaire (no passwords or API keys to be shared).
Financing and lock‑up: no new debt incurrence contemplated; seller lock‑up for 180 days; any figures in cap tables using codes like CAP‑0000 are placeholders only.
Confidentiality and clean team: diligence data room operates on a clean‑team protocol; no national ID cards, medical files, or live bank account numbers will be uploaded; support via helpdesk@pex.example.
Governing law and dispute forum: this term sheet is governed by the laws of Norlandia (EU jurisdiction for purposes here); disputes to be referred to the Norlandia Commercial Mediation Boa
